Domestic Box Office $218,581,815Details

Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,059,709
Total $8,381,264
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The wondrous story of how the world’s greatest inventor, magician and chocolate-maker became the beloved Willy Wonka we know today.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,005,800 (17.8% of total gross)
Legs:5.60 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,203 opening theaters/4,213 max. theaters, 9.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $235,905,319

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 15th, 2023 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
